TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Muo-ni śĎ©Śįľ = Sakizaya a kamu:Muo-ni Hulam a kamu:śĎ©Śįľ Amilika a kamu:Mani Luma'Śģ∂Śļ≠ ci ama ni Muo-ni ngangan u Pa'-ti'-ke, wina ci Ma-li-ya. sepat nu secian a Ya-mei-ni-ya likisi hina sakamu ci nidaan. sakay "wan-kun" a sulit u milalidy nu mipaypayay. Nay-di-mu a " cun-su sakamusa" idaw ku nisulitan Muo-ni a babalaki, pilecuhan atu wawa henay, masakapah a nikaudipan. Pa'-ti-ke naitida mueneng i Ha-ma-dan, sa mabulaw tayda i Pa-pi-lun, eneng satu i Tay-si-hun. idaw ku cacayay a demiad, ci Pa'-ti'-ke mahidatu tu demidemiad tayda i biyu mipaypay, idaw ku malacingay nu sunian sakamusa ci nidaan, amana pienip tu pah, titi atu sakalaledi'. matulin musakamu tu tuluay a demiad, sisa micumud ci nida tu sakay tamelacan milabu. tamelacay singangan tu Mu-ke-ta-si-la-pay, E'-le'-ke'-say-pay, u Yu-tay-ciw a kilisetuay a duma nu tatangahan. tawya, acawa nida sibili, sa i kunyun tucaynem mihcaan sepat a bulad caysip dimiad lecuhan ci Muo-ni. malecuh tu ci Muo-ni, tahsepian ni Ma-li-ya, nengil sa maadih nida idaw ku icelangay patudut ci Muo-nian tapabaw, makatusa a demiad kiya patalumaen ci nida. sepatay ku mihcaan ni Muo-ni, ci ama nida pataydaen i tamelacay nu kitidaan ci Muo-ni, hidan nida nu kiwkay ku nipahabay ci nidaan. . masasining henayŚįĎŚĻī wawa henay ci Muo-ni idawtu ku talakaway nu papatatengaan nidaan, matineng musakamu ci nida, sakay singkuan idaw ku sakanamuhan nida, sakay tamelacay nu kaputan a tineng nai' ku kaliwhan. sabaw tusa ku mihcaan nida, mapaading nu Kun-min-wan-kuo a kamu, ya musakamuay a dungi u "sen-wuo" , duma a nganga u Sun-se di'tu, Tui-in di'tu. sakamusa ku "Sen-wuo" alesen kina ciwpay, caay kaw nu misu ku nu heni. isu han aw tamelacay kisu, caay kaw pakay tidaen kisu. nika cacay henay kaw sapatinaku kisu ayda, tada wawa henay kisu." nika hinian, itida satu i tamelacay nu kaputan ci Muo-ni a maudip, saan ci nida u masacacayay kaku sa, u nidatengan nida inai' ku matinengay, " Ke-lun-muo-ni-ku-cun" sakamusa, "mahida u caayay kalecad nu sidian ci nida sa, mahida u ayaman nu sakacaay kalecad nu kamuan a maudip. nanulingatu katukuh tu sadikuday u punu' nida atu icelang nida ku sakaudip i tu nuhenian, nika inai' ku matinengay ci nidaan, atu mahicaay ku nipabeli ci nidaan, u hica hakiya ku sapabeli ci nidaan tu tuudan, nu heni u bihid sa ku maadihay nu heni." ." amica ku nikahida, ci Mu-ni sakay udiptu nu tinengan itida i tamelacay a kaputan maala nida ku talakaway a idaan. sakakaay nu kiwkay ci Si-ta manamuh ci Muo-nian, paluhida han u wawa nida a midiput. idaw ku cacayay, kainai'an nu tademaw ladayen nida ci Muo-ni miadih tu niculimekan nida tu kakalisiwan, idaw ku balucu' nida sapabeli ci Muo-nian, mangalay papidayday ci Muo-nian itida i tamelacay nu masakaputay a kawawan, nika kaiyan ni Muo-ni. . makakenih ŚąÜś≠ß milayap ci Muo-ni tu Sne-wuo a baluhaay ni datengan, u wayway nida haymaw sa miliyas tu tamelacay a kaputan. tamelacay nu masakaputay miciacay ku nuheni, malukay ku sakaudip nu heni, saan ci Muo-ni sapilangecay a waywayan u miidisay tu langawan a takelal sa, pacici sa pawada' tu sakaala a waywayan tu lami'an. kina cacay tu, idaw ku sakakaay miucul ci Muo-niyan papilabu maluk, maadih nida maketun nu kakawit kiya langaw tanuidang sa, mahida u wawa tanuangic sa. mahemek kina mililiday a tademaw, mibaung i nuayawan ni Muo-ni. . mapatayay a kiwkayśģČśēô tupic sip mihcaan, ci Muo-ni misuayaw ci Suo-luo-ya-se-de-caw a sakacaay kalecad nu nidatengan mihapu a patayen sa. saan ci nida u Ye-su a disi, ci Pa-he'-la-mu yise pabalucu' mipacek ci nidaan i ziwzika. tupelaken ku banges, pasulek i maacakay nu lutukan, pacaiten i Kun-de-sa-pu-e-cen a pananan, sapatawid tu Muo-men a sinza. idaw ku sulit nu Muo-ni kapatayan i papululan. disi ci Muo-se-sin milaylay ci Muo-ni a tatidengan, mala Muo-ni-ciw a sayaway a ciw-cun. sa, ci Pa-he-la-mu yise misuayaw tu Puo-se-ti-kuo a Muo-ni sinzaan malingatu mipenec, u sinza yada tu namin milaliw. 274ŚĻī, . nipasubanaan ni Muo-ni-ciw a midaydayan nu tademaw u caayay hanay ka patay ci Muo-ni sa. saan tu Pa'-ti-ya wen cudadan M5596 nisulitan, mahida u Ti-wan mihulak tu tuud nu dikucan, sidikuc tu duma nu Wan-paw a dadadikucan, takelalay a tademaw hulak saca i udip a dikuc. mueneng ci nida tu takelalay a balungaan, sidikuc tu miwyi, situpel, i takelalay nu pacabayay a di'tuan, itini i kanamuhan nu dadadiwan mikacaw tu sakalepacaw a kadideng mabahel taydan i tapukuwan, itida i Sa-he'zui-waw-yi sakasepat a demiadan, pilipayan sabaw cacay a tukian, itida i Pei-la-pyi-cen, Muo-ni tayda i tapukuwan. M5569Ť®ėŤľČ: .
S.PHON: = muo-ni ** = sakizaja a kamu:muo-ni ńßur~…ĺam a kamu:** amir~…ĺika a kamu:mani r~…ĺuma Ē~ °** ¶i ama ni muo-ni ŇčaŇčan u pa Ē~ °-ti Ē~ °-k…ô, wina ¶i ma-r~…ĺi-ja. s…ôpat nu s…ô ¶ian a ja-m…ôi-ni-ja r~…ĺikisi ńßina sakamu ¶i nidaan. sakaj "wan-kun" a sur~…ĺit u mir~…ĺar~…ĺidj nu mipajpajaj. naj-di-mu a " ¶un-su sakamusa" idaw ku nisur~…ĺitan muo-ni a babar~…ĺaki, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan atu wawa ńß…ônaj, masakapańß a nikaudipan. pa Ē~ °-ti-k…ô naitida mu…ôn…ôŇč i ńßa-ma-dan, sa mabur~…ĺaw tajda i pa-pi-r~…ĺun, …ôn…ôŇč satu i taj-si-ńßun. idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a d…ômiad, ¶i pa Ē~ °-ti Ē~ °-k…ô mańßidatu tu d…ômid…ômiad tajda i biju mipajpaj, idaw ku mar~…ĺa ¶iŇčaj nu sunian sakamusa ¶i nidaan, amana pi…ônip tu pańß, titi atu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdi Ē~ °. matur~…ĺin musakamu tu tur~…ĺuaj a d…ômiad, sisa mi ¶umud ¶i nida tu sakaj tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶an mir~…ĺabu. tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj siŇčaŇčan tu mu-k…ô-ta-si-r~…ĺa-paj, …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °-k…ô Ē~ °-saj-paj, u ju-taj- ¶iw a kir~…ĺis…ôtuaj a duma nu tataŇčańßan. tawja, a ¶awa nida sibir~…ĺi, sa i kunjun tu ¶ajn…ôm mińß ¶aan s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad ¶ajsip dimiad r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶i muo-ni. mar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß tu ¶i muo-ni, tańßs…ôpian ni ma-r~…ĺi-ja, n…ôŇčir~…ĺ sa maadińß nida idaw ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj patudut ¶i muo-nian tapabaw, makatusa a d…ômiad kija patar~…ĺuma…ôn ¶i nida. s…ôpataj ku mińß ¶aan ni muo-ni, ¶i ama nida patajda…ôn i tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu kitidaan ¶i muo-ni, ńßidan nida nu kiwkaj ku nipańßabaj ¶i nidaan. . masasiniŇč ńß…ônaj** wawa ńß…ônaj ¶i muo-ni idawtu ku tar~…ĺakawaj nu papatat…ôŇčaan nidaan, matin…ôŇč musakamu ¶i nida, sakaj siŇčkuan idaw ku sakanamuńßan nida, sakaj tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu kaputan a tin…ôŇč nai Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺiwńßan. sabaw tusa ku mińß ¶aan nida, mapaadiŇč nu kun-min-wan-kuo a kamu, ja musakamuaj a duŇči u "s…ôn-wuo" , duma a ŇčaŇča u sun-s…ô di Ē~ °tu, tui-in di Ē~ °tu. sakamusa ku "s…ôn-wuo" ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn kina ¶iwpaj, ¶aaj kaw nu misu ku nu ńß…ôni. isu ńßan aw tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj kisu, ¶aaj kaw pakaj tida…ôn kisu. nika ¶a ¶aj ńß…ônaj kaw sapatinaku kisu ajda, tada wawa ńß…ônaj kisu." nika ńßinian, itida satu i tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu kaputan ¶i muo-ni a maudip, saan ¶i nida u masa ¶a ¶ajaj kaku sa, u nidat…ôŇčan nida inai Ē~ ° ku matin…ôŇčaj, " k…ô-r~…ĺun-muo-ni-ku- ¶un" sakamusa, "mańßida u ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu sidian ¶i nida sa, mańßida u ajaman nu saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kamuan a maudip. nanur~…ĺiŇčatu katukuńß tu sadikudaj u punu Ē~ ° nida atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nida ku sakaudip i tu nuńß…ônian, nika inai Ē~ ° ku matin…ôŇčaj ¶i nidaan, atu mańßi ¶aaj ku nipab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i nidaan, u ńßi ¶a ńßakija ku sapab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i nidaan tu tuudan, nu ńß…ôni u bińßid sa ku maadińßaj nu ńß…ôni." ." ami ¶a ku nikańßida, ¶i mu-ni sakaj udiptu nu tin…ôŇčan itida i tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a kaputan maar~…ĺa nida ku tar~…ĺakawaj a idaan. sakakaaj nu kiwkaj ¶i si-ta manamuńß ¶i muo-nian, par~…ĺuńßida ńßan u wawa nida a midiput. idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj, kainai Ē~ °an nu tad…ômaw r~…ĺadaj…ôn nida ¶i muo-ni miadińß tu ni ¶ur~…ĺim…ôkan nida tu kakar~…ĺisiwan, idaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nida sapab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i muo-nian, maŇčar~…ĺaj papidajdaj ¶i muo-nian itida i tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu masakaputaj a kawawan, nika kaijan ni muo-ni. . makak…ônińß ** mir~…ĺajap ¶i muo-ni tu sn…ô-wuo a bar~…ĺuńßaaj ni dat…ôŇčan, u wajwaj nida ńßajmaw sa mir~…ĺijas tu tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a kaputan. tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu masakaputaj mi ¶ia ¶aj ku nuńß…ôni, mar~…ĺukaj ku sakaudip nu ńß…ôni, saan ¶i muo-ni sapir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶aj a wajwajan u miidisaj tu r~…ĺaŇčawan a tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ sa, pa ¶i ¶i sa pawada Ē~ ° tu sakaar~…ĺa a wajwajan tu r~…ĺami Ē~ °an. kina ¶a ¶aj tu, idaw ku sakakaaj miu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶i muo-nijan papir~…ĺabu mar~…ĺuk, maadińß nida mak…ôtun nu kakawit kija r~…ĺaŇčaw tanuidaŇč sa, mańßida u wawa tanuaŇči ¶ sa. mańß…ôm…ôk kina mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw, mibauŇč i nuajawan ni muo-ni. . mapatajaj a kiwkaj** tupi ¶ sip mińß ¶aan, ¶i muo-ni misuajaw ¶i suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô- ¶aw a saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nidat…ôŇčan mińßapu a pataj…ôn sa. saan ¶i nida u j…ô-su a disi, ¶i pa-ńß…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺa-mu jis…ô pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° mipa ¶…ôk ¶i nidaan i ziwzika. tup…ôr~…ĺak…ôn ku baŇč…ôs, pasur~…ĺ…ôk i maa ¶akaj nu r~…ĺutukan, pa ¶ait…ôn i kun-d…ô-sa-pu-…ô- ¶…ôn a pananan, sapatawid tu muo-m…ôn a sinza. idaw ku sur~…ĺit nu muo-ni kapatajan i papur~…ĺur~…ĺan. disi ¶i muo-s…ô-sin mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ¶i muo-ni a tatid…ôŇčan, mar~…ĺa muo-ni- ¶iw a sajawaj a ¶iw- ¶un. sa, ¶i pa-ńß…ô-r~…ĺa-mu jis…ô misuajaw tu puo-s…ô-ti-kuo a muo-ni sinzaan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mip…ôn…ô ¶, u sinza jada tu namin mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw. ****, . nipasubanaan ni muo-ni- ¶iw a midajdajan nu tad…ômaw u ¶aajaj ńßanaj ka pataj ¶i muo-ni sa. saan tu pa Ē~ °-ti-ja w…ôn ¶udadan m**** nisur~…ĺitan, mańßida u ti-wan mińßur~…ĺak tu tuud nu diku ¶an, sidiku ¶ tu duma nu wan-paw a dadadiku ¶an, tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw ńßur~…ĺak sa ¶a i udip a diku ¶. mu…ôn…ôŇč ¶i nida tu tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, sidiku ¶ tu miwji, situp…ôr~…ĺ, i tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu pa ¶abajaj a di Ē~ °tuan, itini i kanamuńßan nu dadadiwan mika ¶aw tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw a kadid…ôŇč mabańß…ôr~…ĺ tajdan i tapukuwan, itida i sa-ńß…ô Ē~ °zui-waw-ji sakas…ôpat a d…ômiadan, pir~…ĺipajan sabaw ¶a ¶aj a tukian, itida i p…ôi-r~…ĺa-pji- ¶…ôn, muo-ni tajda i tapukuwan. m******: .
S.FORM: = Muo-ni śĎ©Śįľ = Sakizaya a kamu:Muo-ni Hulam a kamu:śĎ©Śįľ Amilika a kamu:Mani Luma'Śģ∂Śļ≠ ci ama ni Muo-ni ngangan u Pa'-ti'-ke, wina ci Ma-li-ya. sepat nu secian a Ya-mei-ni-ya likisi hina sakamu ci nidaan. sakay "wan-kun" a sulit u milalidy nu mipaypayay. Nay-di-mu a " cun-su sakamusa" idaw ku nisulitan Muo-ni a babalaki, pilecuhan atu wawa henay, masakapah a nikaudipan. Pa'-ti-ke naitida mueneng i Ha-ma-dan, sa mabulaw tayda i Pa-pi-lun, eneng satu i Tay-si-hun. idaw ku cacayay a demiad, ci Pa'-ti'-ke mahidatu tu demidemiad tayda i biyu mipaypay, idaw ku malacingay nu sunian sakamusa ci nidaan, amana pienip tu pah, titi atu sakalaledi'. matulin musakamu tu tuluay a demiad, sisa micumud ci nida tu sakay tamelacan milabu. tamelacay singangan tu Mu-ke-ta-si-la-pay, E'-le'-ke'-say-pay, u Yu-tay-ciw a kilisetuay a duma nu tatangahan. tawya, acawa nida sibili, sa i kunyun tucaynem mihcaan sepat a bulad caysip dimiad lecuhan ci Muo-ni. malecuh tu ci Muo-ni, tahsepian ni Ma-li-ya, nengil sa maadih nida idaw ku icelangay patudut ci Muo-nian tapabaw, makatusa a demiad kiya patalumaen ci nida. sepatay ku mihcaan ni Muo-ni, ci ama nida pataydaen i tamelacay nu kitidaan ci Muo-ni, hidan nida nu kiwkay ku nipahabay ci nidaan. . masasining henayŚįĎŚĻī wawa henay ci Muo-ni idawtu ku talakaway nu papatatengaan nidaan, matineng musakamu ci nida, sakay singkuan idaw ku sakanamuhan nida, sakay tamelacay nu kaputan a tineng nai' ku kaliwhan. sabaw tusa ku mihcaan nida, mapaading nu Kun-min-wan-kuo a kamu, ya musakamuay a dungi u "sen-wuo" , duma a nganga u Sun-se di'tu, Tui-in di'tu. sakamusa ku "Sen-wuo" alesen kina ciwpay, caay kaw nu misu ku nu heni. isu han aw tamelacay kisu, caay kaw pakay tidaen kisu. nika cacay henay kaw sapatinaku kisu ayda, tada wawa henay kisu." nika hinian, itida satu i tamelacay nu kaputan ci Muo-ni a maudip, saan ci nida u masacacayay kaku sa, u nidatengan nida inai' ku matinengay, " Ke-lun-muo-ni-ku-cun" sakamusa, "mahida u caayay kalecad nu sidian ci nida sa, mahida u ayaman nu sakacaay kalecad nu kamuan a maudip. nanulingatu katukuh tu sadikuday u punu' nida atu icelang nida ku sakaudip i tu nuhenian, nika inai' ku matinengay ci nidaan, atu mahicaay ku nipabeli ci nidaan, u hica hakiya ku sapabeli ci nidaan tu tuudan, nu heni u bihid sa ku maadihay nu heni." ." amica ku nikahida, ci Mu-ni sakay udiptu nu tinengan itida i tamelacay a kaputan maala nida ku talakaway a idaan. sakakaay nu kiwkay ci Si-ta manamuh ci Muo-nian, paluhida han u wawa nida a midiput. idaw ku cacayay, kainai'an nu tademaw ladayen nida ci Muo-ni miadih tu niculimekan nida tu kakalisiwan, idaw ku balucu' nida sapabeli ci Muo-nian, mangalay papidayday ci Muo-nian itida i tamelacay nu masakaputay a kawawan, nika kaiyan ni Muo-ni. . makakenih ŚąÜś≠ß milayap ci Muo-ni tu Sne-wuo a baluhaay ni datengan, u wayway nida haymaw sa miliyas tu tamelacay a kaputan. tamelacay nu masakaputay miciacay ku nuheni, malukay ku sakaudip nu heni, saan ci Muo-ni sapilangecay a waywayan u miidisay tu langawan a takelal sa, pacici sa pawada' tu sakaala a waywayan tu lami'an. kina cacay tu, idaw ku sakakaay miucul ci Muo-niyan papilabu maluk, maadih nida maketun nu kakawit kiya langaw tanuidang sa, mahida u wawa tanuangic sa. mahemek kina mililiday a tademaw, mibaung i nuayawan ni Muo-ni. . mapatayay a kiwkayśģČśēô tupic sip mihcaan, ci Muo-ni misuayaw ci Suo-luo-ya-se-de-caw a sakacaay kalecad nu nidatengan mihapu a patayen sa. saan ci nida u Ye-su a disi, ci Pa-he'-la-mu yise pabalucu' mipacek ci nidaan i ziwzika. tupelaken ku banges, pasulek i maacakay nu lutukan, pacaiten i Kun-de-sa-pu-e-cen a pananan, sapatawid tu Muo-men a sinza. idaw ku sulit nu Muo-ni kapatayan i papululan. disi ci Muo-se-sin milaylay ci Muo-ni a tatidengan, mala Muo-ni-ciw a sayaway a ciw-cun. sa, ci Pa-he-la-mu yise misuayaw tu Puo-se-ti-kuo a Muo-ni sinzaan malingatu mipenec, u sinza yada tu namin milaliw. 274ŚĻī, . nipasubanaan ni Muo-ni-ciw a midaydayan nu tademaw u caayay hanay ka patay ci Muo-ni sa. saan tu Pa'-ti-ya wen cudadan M5596 nisulitan, mahida u Ti-wan mihulak tu tuud nu dikucan, sidikuc tu duma nu Wan-paw a dadadikucan, takelalay a tademaw hulak saca i udip a dikuc. mueneng ci nida tu takelalay a balungaan, sidikuc tu miwyi, situpel, i takelalay nu pacabayay a di'tuan, itini i kanamuhan nu dadadiwan mikacaw tu sakalepacaw a kadideng mabahel taydan i tapukuwan, itida i Sa-he'zui-waw-yi sakasepat a demiadan, pilipayan sabaw cacay a tukian, itida i Pei-la-pyi-cen, Muo-ni tayda i tapukuwan. S.PHON: = muo-ni ** = sakizaja a kamu:muo-ni ńßur~…ĺam a kamu:** amir~…ĺika a kamu:mani r~…ĺuma Ē~ °** ¶i ama ni muo-ni ŇčaŇčan u pa Ē~ °-ti Ē~ °-k…ô, wina ¶i ma-r~…ĺi-ja. s…ôpat nu s…ô ¶ian a ja-m…ôi-ni-ja r~…ĺikisi ńßina sakamu ¶i nidaan. sakaj "wan-kun" a sur~…ĺit u mir~…ĺar~…ĺidj nu mipajpajaj. naj-di-mu a " ¶un-su sakamusa" idaw ku nisur~…ĺitan muo-ni a babar~…ĺaki, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan atu wawa ńß…ônaj, masakapańß a nikaudipan. pa Ē~ °-ti-k…ô naitida mu…ôn…ôŇč i ńßa-ma-dan, sa mabur~…ĺaw tajda i pa-pi-r~…ĺun, …ôn…ôŇč satu i taj-si-ńßun. idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a d…ômiad, ¶i pa Ē~ °-ti Ē~ °-k…ô mańßidatu tu d…ômid…ômiad tajda i biju mipajpaj, idaw ku mar~…ĺa ¶iŇčaj nu sunian sakamusa ¶i nidaan, amana pi…ônip tu pańß, titi atu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdi Ē~ °. matur~…ĺin musakamu tu tur~…ĺuaj a d…ômiad, sisa mi ¶umud ¶i nida tu sakaj tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶an mir~…ĺabu. tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj siŇčaŇčan tu mu-k…ô-ta-si-r~…ĺa-paj, …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °-k…ô Ē~ °-saj-paj, u ju-taj- ¶iw a kir~…ĺis…ôtuaj a duma nu tataŇčańßan. tawja, a ¶awa nida sibir~…ĺi, sa i kunjun tu ¶ajn…ôm mińß ¶aan s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad ¶ajsip dimiad r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶i muo-ni. mar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß tu ¶i muo-ni, tańßs…ôpian ni ma-r~…ĺi-ja, n…ôŇčir~…ĺ sa maadińß nida idaw ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj patudut ¶i muo-nian tapabaw, makatusa a d…ômiad kija patar~…ĺuma…ôn ¶i nida. s…ôpataj ku mińß ¶aan ni muo-ni, ¶i ama nida patajda…ôn i tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu kitidaan ¶i muo-ni, ńßidan nida nu kiwkaj ku nipańßabaj ¶i nidaan. . masasiniŇč ńß…ônaj** wawa ńß…ônaj ¶i muo-ni idawtu ku tar~…ĺakawaj nu papatat…ôŇčaan nidaan, matin…ôŇč musakamu ¶i nida, sakaj siŇčkuan idaw ku sakanamuńßan nida, sakaj tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu kaputan a tin…ôŇč nai Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺiwńßan. sabaw tusa ku mińß ¶aan nida, mapaadiŇč nu kun-min-wan-kuo a kamu, ja musakamuaj a duŇči u "s…ôn-wuo" , duma a ńß…ônaj kaw sapatinaku kisu ajda, tada wawa ńß…ônaj kisu." nika ńßinian, itida satu i tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu kaputan ¶i muo-ni a maudip, saan ¶i nida u masa ¶a ¶ajaj kaku sa, u nidat…ôŇčan nida inai Ē~ ° ku matin…ôŇčaj, " k…ô-r~…ĺun-muo-ni-ku- ¶un" sakamusa, "mańßida u ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu sidian ¶i nida sa, mańßida u ajaman nu saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kamuan a maudip. nanur~…ĺiŇčatu katukuńß tu sadikudaj u punu Ē~ ° nida atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nida ku sakaudip i tu nuńß…ônian, nika inai Ē~ ° ku matin…ôŇčaj ¶i nidaan, atu mańßi ¶aaj ku nipab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i nidaan, u ńßi ¶a ńßakija ku sapab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i nidaan tu tuudan, nu ńß…ôni u bińßid sa ku maadińßaj nu ńß…ôni." ." ami ¶a ku nikańßida, ¶i mu-ni sakaj udiptu nu tin…ôŇčan itida i tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj a kaputan maar~…ĺa nida ku tar~…ĺakawaj a idaan. sakakaaj nu kiwkaj ¶i si-ta manamuńß ¶i muo-nian, par~…ĺuńßida ńßan u wawa nida a midiput. idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj, kainai Ē~ °an nu tad…ômaw r~…ĺadaj…ôn nida ¶i muo-ni miadińß tu ni ¶ur~…ĺim…ôkan nida tu kakar~…ĺisiwan, idaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nida sapab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i muo-nian, maŇčar~…ĺaj papidajdaj ¶i muo-nian itida i tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu masakaputaj a kawawan, nika kaijan ni muo-ni. . makak…ônińß ** sakaudip nu ńß…ôni, saan ¶i muo-ni sapir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶aj a wajwajan u miidisaj tu r~…ĺaŇčawan a tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ sa, pa ¶i ¶i sa pawada Ē~ ° tu sakaar~…ĺa a wajwajan tu r~…ĺami Ē~ °an. kina ¶a ¶aj tu, idaw ku sakakaaj miu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶i muo-nijan papir~…ĺabu mar~…ĺuk, maadińß nida mak…ôtun nu kakawit kija r~…ĺaŇčaw tanuidaŇč sa, mańßida u wawa tanuaŇči ¶ sa. mańß…ôm…ôk kina mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw, pananan, sapatawid tu muo-m…ôn a sinza. idaw ku sur~…ĺit nu muo-ni kapatajan i papur~…ĺur~…ĺan. disi ¶i muo-s…ô-sin mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ¶i muo-ni a tatid…ôŇčan, mar~…ĺa muo-ni- ¶iw a sajawaj a ¶iw- ¶un. ¶aajaj ńßanaj ka pataj ¶i muo-ni sa. saan tu pa Ē~ °-ti-ja w…ôn ¶udadan m**** nisur~…ĺitan, mańßida u ti-wan mińßur~…ĺak tu tuud nu diku ¶an, sidiku ¶ tu duma nu wan-paw a dadadiku ¶an,
